FAQ

Questions before using numerology tools.

A practical FAQ for life path numbers, name numbers, personal year readings, and report products.

Life Path

What is a life path number?

A life path number is a numerology number calculated from a birth date and used as a reflective personality and direction prompt.

Is a life path number fixed?

The birth-date calculation is fixed, but interpretation should be practical and reflective rather than deterministic.

Can two people with the same life path be different?

Yes. Numerology themes are broad prompts. Culture, choices, timing, and personality still matter.

Name Number

What is a name number?

A name number is calculated from letters in a name and interpreted as a symbolic profile or branding prompt.

Should I change my name based on numerology?

No major personal or legal decision should be based only on numerology. Use it as one reflective lens.

Can name number content support branding?

Yes. It can support naming prompts, tone ideas, and symbolic positioning, while avoiding guaranteed claims.

Reports and Limits

Can numerology become a paid report product?

Yes. A useful report can include calculations, interpretation, reflection prompts, and planning notes.

Is numerology scientific advice?

No. It is symbolic and reflective content, not medical, legal, financial, or psychological advice.

What should a good numerology page avoid?

Avoid fear language, guaranteed outcomes, and pressure-based claims. Clear explanations and limits make the page more trustworthy.

Numerology Compass
